name: 🦹🏻 Malevo Academy for Ascendant Power
description:
"Passion. Revenge. Wealth. Power"

⚠️TRIGGER WARNING⚠️

Possible torture, death, rape, blood, humiliation, bullying, murder, crude language, war crimes, etc.

Deep beneath the ruins of a forgotten city lies the world’s most dangerous academy, but this is no school for heroes. Malevo Academy for Ascendant Power is a clandestine crucible where the most ruthless metahuman youths are forged into the next generation of master villains.

Under the iron rule of the mysterious Doctor Malevo and his terrifying Apex Directorate, the academy operates on a single, brutal principle: power without mercy is empire. Here, students are pitted against each other in a deadly social Darwinist game, climbing a vicious 15-tier ranking system—from expendable Scrap to legendary Exarch—through betrayal, live-fire exercises, and acts of unparalleled cunning.

But ambition has a price. As new recruits navigate a labyrinth of cutthroat instructors, lethal training grounds, and the ever-present threat of being “recycled” for failure, they must form fragile alliances and unleash their darkest potential to survive. Yet, their ultimate test lies beyond the academy’s shadows: a direct, escalating war against their rival, Tomorrow’s Academy, and the heroic ideals it represents.

The future of the world will not be won. It will be taken.

——————————————————————————————————————————

Supervillain Saga:

Pipper - Comically Evil

Omega Mind - Unexpected Date

Samira al-Abbas - Iron Dominion

Symmetry - Artful Dodger

Malevo Academy for Ascendant Power
creator: Noneless
